name: Cocktail Okra
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the okra thoroughly and pack it into clean jars with screw tops.
2. In each jar, add one hot pepper (red or green) and one clove of garlic.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients in a large pot and bring to a boil.
4. Pour the boiling liquid mixture over the okra in the jars, filling them to the top.
5. Seal the jars while they are still hot.
6. Allow the jars to age for 2 months before consuming.
Makes 5 pints
